Your Perfect Hotel Experience,
Powered by Deafah

LUXURY DEAFAH

"Premium Hospitality for Pilgrims & Guests"

Al Deafah International Group is a trusted name in luxury hospitality, known for providing seamless hotel accommodations and tailored services during Hajj, Umrah, and throughout the year. Our mission is to ensure comfort, convenience, and spiritual peace for every guest, whether arriving individually or in groups.
With properties located near the Haramain, our services combine traditional Arabian hospitality with modern luxury. We offer 24/7 assistance, group travel arrangements, multilingual staff, and curated packages designed to enhance your pilgrimage experience or business visit with utmost care.
About Us

Our Customer Feedback

What Client's Say?

Our stay at Deafah Hotels exceeded all expectations. The ambience was relaxing, the staff extremely courteous, and the location perfect for exploring the city.
Pilgrim
Aisha Karim
From check-in to check-out, everything was seamless at Deafah. The rooms were spotless and the service was truly five-star. I will definitely return!

Deafah provided an amazing experience. The staff was incredibly helpful, and the hospitality made me feel right at home. Highly recommended!
